description: A long-time user of a streaming service complains that their content recommendations are irrelevant.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the user's viewing history and their currently recommended content list.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent accesses the user's profile and recommendation data.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the viewing history and identify the primary genres the user watches.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent determines the user primarily watches historical dramas and documentaries.

nodes.task_description: Trigger a full refresh of the user's recommendation profile to re-calibrate the algorithm.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates a profile refresh.
